nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 厄瓜多尔蚁鵙
nodes.summary: 厄瓜多尔蚁鵙（学名：Thamnophilus praecox）是蚁鵙科蚁鵙属的一种，为厄瓜多尔的特有种。 厄瓜多尔蚁鵙的自然栖息地是亚热带或热带的沼泽，因栖息地遭到破坏而受威胁。

nodes.name: 秘鲁
nodes.summary: 秘鲁是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联962种鸟类，包括北山䳍、高山斑䳍、丽色斑䳍等962种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 厄瓜多尔
nodes.summary: 厄瓜多尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联857种鸟类，包括安第斯斑䳍、红头林䳍、灰䳍等857种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 哥伦比亚
nodes.summary: 哥伦比亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联947种鸟类，包括红头林䳍、灰䳍、白喉䳍等947种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cocha antshrike (Thamnophilus praecox) is a Near Threatened species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cocha antshrike (Thamnophilus praecox) is a Near Threatened species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cocha antshrike (Thamnophilus praecox) is a Near Threatened species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Deforestation is extensive in the western part of the range (particularly in Ecuador) due to the expansion of oil exploration...[v]ast areas of pristine habitat however remain in the eastern part of the range." Though the cocha antshrike was described for science in 1937, it was known only from the holotype until 1990, when it was rediscovered near where that specimen had been collected
